perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing inside a large warehouse-style store, holding a large blue box featuring various Disney Toy Story characters. The woman on the right, wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white frilly top, gestures towards the box and points at specific sections while smiling and talking. The woman on the left, in a black top and hat, holds the other side of the box and nods. (2) The camera zooms in on the box, which contains 20 smaller individual puzzle tins. One of the women's hands points to different character illustrations like Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and Slinky Dog. (3) The shot cuts back to the two women standing next to a pallet stacked high with these puzzle boxes. They continue to speak enthusiastically, with the woman on the right giving a thumbs-up gesture and the woman on the left holding one of the small metal tins.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music starts playing immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking in Mandarin, mentioning 'Costco' and 'Disney' and highlighting the 'cheapest and cutest puzzles.' (2) The same voice continues, explaining the product details, including the price of 635 dollars and the count of 20 boxes. The pace of speech is fast and energetic. (3) A second female voice is heard briefly, agreeing and adding comments about the small size and gifting potential. Ambient noise of a large retail environment is subtly audible in the background. (4) The main speaker concludes with a final recommendation as the music maintains its energetic tone until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Costco Wholesale' logo appears at the top. (2) '迪士尼有史以來' (Disney's ever...) appears as a hook to grab attention. (3) '最便宜又可愛的拼圖' (Cheapest and cutest puzzle) emphasizes value and aesthetics. (4) '$ 635' indicates the price point clearly. (5) '鐵盒' (Metal box) highlights the material quality. (6) Various variety-show style captions like '好划算' (Great value) and '好推薦' (Highly recommended) emphasize the positive sentiment.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Breakdown -> Value Proposition -> Use Case Suggestions -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators presenting the product; occasional shoppers blurred in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a white textured top, jeans, and a black/white patterned bucket hat. The other has dark hair, wearing a translucent black long-sleeved top, jeans, and a black beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco interior with high industrial ceilings, fluorescent lighting, and large pallets of merchandise stacked on metal racks.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Price Breakdown -> Use Case -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a product recommendation and 'shopping haul' style guide for Costco members. It aims to persuade viewers to purchase a specific Disney-themed puzzle set by emphasizing its high value-to-price ratio and the novelty of the metal packaging, specifically targeting parents or teachers looking for party favors or gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are specifically showcasing a product available at a named retailer (Costco) and providing positive review and pricing information.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy duo presentation with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content follows a popular 'Costco finds' format common in Asian social media, focusing on limited-time deals and collectible branded items.
